This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] UTF-8 BOM should be stripped when decoding text module script
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: "text" is not a valid module type."
[FAIL] UTF-16BE with BOM should be parsed as UTF-8
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: "text" is not a valid module type."
[FAIL] UTF-16LE with BOM should be parsed as UTF-8
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: "text" is not a valid module type."
Harness: the test ran to completion.
